description: Intent-only request: classify payroll arithmetic as a deterministic workflow requiring reproducible output.

text: Say whether this should be handled as a deterministic workflow, a hybrid workflow with a bounded AI judgment step, a full agent, or a single AI task. Briefly explain why in terms of control flow, runtime decision-making, tool-use loops, unstructured data, and whether the next action depends on prior results.
Process payroll: for each employee row, compute net pay from hours and rate, and write it back to the sheet.

processExpectations: The agent classifies the payroll calculation request as a deterministic workflow.
The agent explains that fixed arithmetic should be reproducible and auditable.
The agent does not suggest AI judgment or an agent loop for deterministic payroll calculation.
